description: A styled call-to-action link button used site-wide for primary actions and navigation.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard button linking to an internal page

stories.name: WithTitle
stories.description: Button with a title attribute for additional context

stories.name: ExternalLink
stories.description: Button linking to an external URL

props.label: Complete the survey
props.title: Survey on the meat free day-to-day (Qualtrics)

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple buttons rendered together as typically seen in course pages

notes: The .uosbutton class is always applied to an anchor tag. Visual variants (dark background, highlight background) are controlled by ancestor classes .dark and .highlight — these are context classes, not props on the button itself. The title attribute is present in some instances but not all; when absent it should not be rendered. CMS data attributes (data-entity-type, data-entity-uuid, data-entity-substitution) should be ignored.
